task.title: Create a Milestone
task.shortdesc: Add outcome-based milestones to a project to define what done looks like at each meaningful stage of the work.

context.p: Milestones represent completed outcomes, not tasks. Describe each milestone as a state that will be true when a phase of work is finished: "First draft complete," not "Write first draft."

step.cmd: In the project dropdown at the top of the tab, select the project you want to add a milestone to.
In the Description field, enter the outcome name.

info.p: Write this as a noun phrase or past-tense statement that describes what will be true when this phase is complete. Examples:

choices.choice: Select Backlog for a future milestone not yet in scope.
Select Planned for a milestone you are actively working toward.

step.cmd: (Optional) Enter a Target Date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
(Optional) Enter any notes that help clarify what this milestone means or how you will know it is achieved.

step.stepresult: The milestone appears in the Milestones list for the selected project.
